welcome.title: Welcome to AI Interview Architect
welcome.description: A quick one-minute tour for hiring teams: build your question bank, create interviews, share candidate links, and review assessments. You can skip anytime.

complete.title: You're all set
complete.description: You're ready to run the workflow. You can replay this tour anytime from Product tour.
complete.recapQuestions: Build and enrich questions with AI Draft
complete.recapInterviews: Assemble interviews from your question bank

dashboardHero.title: Your home base
dashboardHero.description: This is where you land after logging in. Recent interviews and quick actions live here.

questionsLibrary.title: Build your question bank first
questionsLibrary.description: Interviews are assembled from questions, so this is the natural place to start.

questionsText.title: Write the question prompt
questionsText.description: Start with the main question text. Then use AI Draft to generate the follow-ups, rubric, and sample answer.

questionsAiDraft.title: Generate an AI draft
questionsAiDraft.description: Click Generate AI Draft to fill in the supporting question details from your prompt.

questionsAiApply.title: Apply the draft
questionsAiApply.description: Review the generated suggestions, then click Apply All to add them to the question.

questionsCreate.title: Save the question
questionsCreate.description: Click Create Question to save the question with the AI-generated details.

assessmentsIntro.title: Review workspace
assessmentsIntro.description: When candidates finish their sessions, return here to evaluate responses, scores, and AI-generated insights.

assessmentsEvaluation.title: Start AI evaluation
assessmentsEvaluation.description: This card is ready for AI review. Click Start AI evaluation to score the submitted interview.

candidateLink.title: Share the candidate link
candidateLink.description: Copy this link and send it to the candidate. They complete the interview through the take flow.

interviewCandidate.title: Candidate profile
interviewCandidate.description: Enter the candidate's name and target role, then click Create Interview. We'll continue on the candidate link after it is created.

interviewPicker.title: Select at least one question
interviewPicker.description: Search your bank and pick at least one question for this session. As soon as you select one, we'll move on to creating the interview.
